---
title: "SCIM 2.0 Enterprise User Extension (RFC 7643 §4.3)"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · enterprise-user.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/scim/enterprise-user.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/scim/enterprise-user.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.io/schemas/scim/enterprise-user.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Validates the body of the SCIM Enterprise User extension as defined in RFC 7643 §4.3. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User. Pinned to UIAO_143. This schema validates the *extension object* — i.e. the value at the key 'urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User' on a User resource — not a standalone resource.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `employeeNumber` | string |  | RFC 7643 §4.3. String identifier (numeric or alphanumeric) assigned to a person, typically based on order of hire. |
| `costCenter` | string |  | RFC 7643 §4.3. Cost center name. |
| `organization` | string |  | RFC 7643 §4.3. Organization name. |
| `division` | string |  | RFC 7643 §4.3. Division name. |
| `department` | string |  | RFC 7643 §4.3. Department name. |
| `manager` | object |  | RFC 7643 §4.3. Complex type referencing the user's manager. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="enterprise-user.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.io/schemas/scim/enterprise-user.schema.json",
  "title": "SCIM 2.0 Enterprise User Extension (RFC 7643 \u00a74.3)",
  "description": "Validates the body of the SCIM Enterprise User extension as defined in RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User. Pinned to UIAO_143. This schema validates the *extension object* \u2014 i.e. the value at the key 'urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User' on a User resource \u2014 not a standalone resource.",
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "employeeNumber": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. String identifier (numeric or alphanumeric) assigned to a person, typically based on order of hire."
    },
    "costCenter": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. Cost center name."
    },
    "organization": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. Organization name."
    },
    "division": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. Division name."
    },
    "department": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. Department name."
    },
    "manager": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.3. Complex type referencing the user's manager.",
      "properties": {
        "value": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The 'id' of the SCIM resource representing the user's manager. RECOMMENDED."
        },
        "$ref": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "uri",
          "description": "URI of the SCIM resource representing the user's manager. RECOMMENDED."
        },
        "displayName": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "displayName of the user's manager. OPTIONAL, mutability readOnly."
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": true
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```
